title: stenoschista togoensis
intro: Stenoschista togoensis is a species of plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to Togo and other parts of West Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stenoschista togoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues.
